TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Davugele ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 252 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 198 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 54 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 與金崙部落混居. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Davugele hya' ga Kanadun. tay mkyahu' na Davugele hya' ga Cilalongay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Davugele ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Davugele ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *a*uɣele ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, *******. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *a*uɣele ħjaʔ ɣa kana*un. taj mkjaħuʔ na *a*uɣele ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨilaloŋaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *a*uɣele ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *a*uɣele ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Davugele ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Tayimari go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 252 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 198 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 54 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 與金崙部落混居. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Davugele hya' ga Kanadun. tay mkyahu' na Davugele hya' ga Cilalongay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Davugele ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Davugele ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *a*uɣele ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajimari ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, *******. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *a*uɣele ħjaʔ ɣa kana*un. taj mkjaħuʔ na *a*uɣele ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨilaloŋaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *a*uɣele ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *a*uɣele ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
